openalex.note: Phase 2: uses DOIs obtained from Phase 1 sources

openfda.note: Phase 3: FAERS post-market safety signals — separate from trial outcomes

phase_ordering.description: Phase 1 sources (PubMed, EuropePMC) provide PMIDs and DOIs. Phase 2 sources (OpenAlex, Crossref, Unpaywall, OpenCitations) use DOIs from Phase 1. Phase 3 (OpenFDA) is independent safety surveillance data.

primary_sources.description: Primary search sources for trial identification (separate from enrichment)

ctgov.note: ClinicalTrials.gov API v2 — primary registry search

pubmed.note: PubMed E-utilities — published RCTs that may lack CT.gov registration
